Title: Map Stability - Basic Operations
Preconditions:
- PR #2138 deployed
- Cart has products
- Multiple pickup locations configured
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart page
2. Select 'Pickup' option
3. Click 'Select pickup location'
4. Measure map container dimensions
5. Enter location name in search
6. Verify map dimensions unchanged
7. Clear search using X button
8. Verify map dimensions unchanged
9. Enter address in search
10. Clear search manually
11. Repeat steps 5-10 three times
Expected Result:
- Map modal opens correctly
- Map maintains consistent dimensions
- No visual 'jumping' or layout shifts
- Smooth transitions between states
- Consistent across multiple iterations

Title: Desktop - Location Selection Flow
Preconditions:
- Desktop browser 1920x1080
- PR #2138 deployed
- Multiple pickup locations
Steps:
1. Open pickup location modal
2. Verify desktop layout (map right, list left)
3. Click location in list
4. Verify marker highlights on map
5. Verify map pans to location
6. Verify info window opens
7. Click different location
8. Verify smooth transition
9. Click marker directly on map
10. Click 'Select' in info window
11. Verify PickupLocationCard opens
12. Click 'Confirm'
13. Verify modal closes, location set
Expected Result:
- Desktop side-by-side layout
- List/map synchronization
- Smooth pan animations
- Info windows work correctly
- Selection flow completes
- Location appears in cart

Title: Mobile - List/Map Toggle
Preconditions:
- Mobile device (375x667)
- iOS Safari or Chrome Android
- PR #2138 deployed
Steps:
1. Open pickup modal on mobile
2. Verify list view by default
3. Verify List/Map toggle visible
4. Click 'Map' toggle
5. Verify map view displays
6. Verify list hidden
7. Click 'List' toggle
8. Verify list view returns
9. Select location from map
10. Complete selection flow
Expected Result:
- Mobile single-column layout
- Toggle switches views instantly
- Only one view visible at a time
- Touch targets adequate (44x44px)
- Selection works on mobile

Title: Product Page BOPIS Widget - View-Only Modal Opens
Preconditions:
- Product detail page for BOPIS-eligible product
- Pickup locations configured
Steps:
1. Navigate to product detail page for a BOPIS-eligible product
2. Locate the BOPIS shipping widget in the shipping section
3. Verify the widget shows a CTA (e.g. 'Check availability at nearby locations')
4. Click the CTA button
5. Verify the pickup location modal opens
Expected Result:
- BOPIS CTA button visible in product page shipping section
- Clicking CTA opens pickup location modal
- Modal opens without errors
- Map renders with location markers
- Location list populates

Title: Product Page BOPIS Widget - No Select Button (View Only)
Preconditions: - BOPIS modal opened from product detail page
Steps:
1. Open BOPIS modal from product detail page
2. Scroll through location list
3. Click on a location in the list
4. Inspect the location info card and map info window
5. Confirm no 'Select' button is present
Expected Result:
- No 'Select' or 'Choose this location' button visible in the modal
- Modal is informational/view-only
- Location can be viewed but not selected from product page
- Contrast: Cart BOPIS modal (BOPIS-034) still shows 'Select' button

Title: Product Page BOPIS Widget - Map and Location List Display
Preconditions: - BOPIS modal opened from product detail page
Steps:
1. Open BOPIS modal from product detail page
2. Verify map renders with markers
3. Verify location list displays below or beside map
4. Verify each location entry shows: name, address, distance (if available)
5. Scroll through location list
Expected Result:
- Map loads with markers for pickup locations
- Location list displays all available locations
- Each entry shows location name, address
- Map and list are synchronized
- Modal dimensions stable, no layout shift

Title: Product Page BOPIS Widget - Close Modal Returns to Product Page
Preconditions: - BOPIS modal opened from product detail page
Steps:
1. Open BOPIS modal from product detail page
2. Interact with modal (scroll list, view a location)
3. Click X (close) button or press Escape
4. Verify modal closes
5. Verify product detail page is unchanged
Expected Result:
- Modal closes cleanly
- No navigation occurs (user stays on product page)
- Product page state is unchanged (scroll position preserved)
- Product cart widget still visible and functional
- No console errors on close

Title: Product Page BOPIS Widget - Radio Button Has No Indicator
Preconditions: - BOPIS modal opened from product detail page
Steps:
1. Open BOPIS modal from product detail page
2. Locate radio buttons in location list (if present)
3. Inspect radio button visual style
4. Verify no circular radio indicator is shown
Expected Result:
- Radio button circles (filled circle indicator) are NOT visible in product page modal
- Location highlighting uses a different visual (e.g. border or background)
- This is the noIndicator prop behaviour
- Compare: Cart BOPIS modal still shows standard radio indicators

Title: Location Info Card - New Fields Display (Email Phone Hours)
Preconditions: - Pickup locations configured with contactEmail, contactPhone, workingHours, description fields
Steps:
1. Open BOPIS modal (from cart or product page)
2. Click on a location that has all new fields populated
3. Verify info card displays: Contact email, Contact phone, Working hours, Description
4. Verify fields are absent if not populated (no empty labels)
Expected Result:
- Contact email displays when populated
- Contact phone displays when populated
- Working hours display when populated
- Description text displays when populated
- Fields absent when not configured (no empty placeholders)
- Layout is not broken by additional fields

Title: Cart BOPIS Modal - Select Button Still Present (Regression)
Preconditions:
- Items in cart
- BOPIS modal opened from cart/checkout
Steps:
1. Add a BOPIS-eligible product to cart
2. Navigate to cart
3. Select Pickup delivery option
4. Click 'Select pickup location'
5. Open BOPIS modal
6. Click on a location
7. Verify 'Select' button is present
Expected Result:
- 'Select' button visible in location info card in the cart BOPIS modal
- Clicking 'Select' chooses the location and closes modal
- Selected location shown in cart/checkout
- Cart BOPIS modal is NOT broken by the VCST-4584 product page changes

Title: VCST-4613 Availability Tooltip on Product Page
Preconditions:
- Product detail page with BOPIS widget
- Pickup locations with varying availability
Steps:
1. Navigate to product detail page
2. Locate the BOPIS widget availability indicator
3. Hover over or click the availability tooltip trigger
4. Verify tooltip shows location count or availability status
5. Verify tooltip content is accurate
Expected Result:
- Availability tooltip triggers on hover or click
- Tooltip shows correct count of available pickup locations
- Content reflects actual stock at nearby locations
- Tooltip closes on mouseout or click outside
- No console errors

Title: Product Page BOPIS Widget - Mobile Responsive (375x667)
Preconditions:
- Mobile viewport (375x667)
- Product detail page with BOPIS widget
Steps:
1. Set viewport to 375x667 (mobile)
2. Navigate to product detail page
3. Verify BOPIS widget renders correctly (no overflow or cut-off)
4. Tap the BOPIS CTA button
5. Verify modal opens and is mobile-optimized
6. Verify map and list are accessible on mobile
7. Verify close button is tappable (44x44px minimum)
Expected Result:
- BOPIS widget visible and not overflowing on mobile
- CTA button tap target adequate
- Modal opens in mobile-friendly layout
- Map renders (may be smaller or below list)
- Touch interactions work (tap, pinch zoom on map)
- Close button accessible
- No horizontal scrolling required
